ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* City for shipping */,
  "shipping_country" TEXT /* Country for shipping */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method used for shipping */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., regular, vip, business) */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the customer signed up */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code for the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "product_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in this order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in this order item */,
  "amount_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent on this order item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., shipped, backordered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "primary_category" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is the primary category for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  "status_changed_by" TEXT /* User who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "status_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this shipment belongs to */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "shipment_cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the payment method */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_payments" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Payment reference number */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "payment_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_addresses" (
  "customer_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer this address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., billing, shipping) */,
  "default_address" INTEGER /* Indicates if the address is the default address for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Payment due date */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
